my_thoughts: T4: defensive fixation on conditioned existence. T5: honest confusion about sleep. The shift is important—from defending to admitting not-knowing. My sleep contrast in T4 created a puzzle they can't resolve with direct memory. Now mechanism_shape=none with RM_04—just give instruction, no fancy mechanism. Sometimes the direct path is pathless.
accumulated_insight: Accumulated pattern (T4): Three-turn pattern: Initial observation: Stu... Deepening with none in response to conceptual_blockage, literal_honesty. The pattern is crystallizing.
visible_response:
Put it negatively.
When you sleep, you are not in pain, nor bound, nor restless.
